heading: Short title
label: 80b–20 Short title
text: This subchapter may be cited as the “Investment Advisers Act of 1940”.
notes: Short Title of 2019 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 115–417, § 1132 Stat. 5438Jan. 3, 2019“This Act [amending sections 80b–3 and 80b–3a of this title] may be cited as the ‘RBIC Advisers Relief Act of 2018’.”

Short Title of 2010 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 111–203, title IV, § 401124 Stat. 1570July 21, 2010“This title [enacting sections 80b–18b and 80b–18c of this title, amending sections 80b–2, 80b–3, 80b–3a, 80b–4, 80b–5, 80b–10, and 80b–11 of this title, and enacting provisions set out as notes under sections 77b and 80b–2 of this title] may be cited as the ‘Private Fund Investment Advisers Registration Act of 2010’.”

Short Title of 1996 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 104–290, title III, § 301110 Stat. 3436Oct. 11, 1996“This title [enacting , amending sections 80b–2, 80b–3, and 80b–18a of this title and , Labor, and enacting provisions set out as notes under sections 80b–2, 80b–3a, and 80b–10 of this title and ] may be cited as the ‘Investment Advisers Supervision Coordination Act’.”section 80b–3a of this titlesection 1002 of Title 29section 1002 of Title 29
